Beginning at a point on the easterly right-of-way of State Road 32; thence N 15°30'00" E, 200.00 feet; thence S 74°30'00" E, 150.00 feet; thence S 15°30'00" W, 175.00 feet; thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 500.00 feet, an arc length of 150.00 feet, and a chord bearing N 82°45'00" W, 149.50 feet; thence N 74°30'00" W, 25.00 feet to the point of beginning.
